use_codes.desc: TO REDUCE THE RISK OF STROKE IN PATIENTS WHO HAVE HAD TRANSIENT ISCHEMIA OF THE BRAIN OR COMPLETED ISCHEMIC STROKE DUE TO THROMBOSIS

indications.text: AGGRENOX is indicated to reduce the risk of stroke in patients who have had transient ischemia of the brain or completed ischemic stroke due to thrombosis.
